events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: Loop checks & wiring, tested/inspected stage. Field condition: missing surge protection on field side. Reference: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Missing surge protection is a non-compliance if drawings require it. This is a defect. Decision: fail. Risk: medium/high. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 90. Confidence high.
